title: oenothera hazeliae var. subterminalis
intro: Oenothera hazeliae var. subterminalis, also known as the Evening Primrose, is a plant species that belongs to the family Onagraceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its high content of gamma-linolenic acid (GLA), an essential fatty acid with anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Oenothera hazeliae var. subterminalis include relief from symptoms of menopause, eczema, and rheumatoid arthritis, as well as support for heart health and immune system function. Oenothera hazeliae var. subterminalis is commonly prepared as a cold-pressed oil or as a dietary supplement in capsule or tablet form, and it can also be used as a topical cream or salve for skin conditions.
